# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source is institute-worthy because it presents direct experimental results on coding-agent performance.

## Why

The excerpt describes an arXiv research manuscript evaluating coding agents across SWE-bench tasks and a newly constructed benchmark, reporting specific measured effects including reduced success rates in some settings, a marginal average improvement for developer-provided files, a negative average effect for LLM-generated files, and cost increases of over 20%. That is real empirical substance, not commentary.

## Limits
